chapter.para: This section provides support for accessing the key/value store functionality on HPCC Systems clusters. The Store module allows you to create stores, manage namespaces, and perform key/value operations for persisting data across workunit executions.

sect1.title: Key/Value Store Overview
sect1.para: The Store module provides a persistent key/value storage mechanism that allows data to be stored and retrieved across multiple workunit executions. The key/value store is organized hierarchically:

listitem.para: Stores: Top-level containers that hold namespaces. Stores can be global (accessible to all users) or user-specific (private to an individual user).
Namespaces: Logical partitions within stores that group related keys together.
Keys: Named identifiers that map to stored values. Keys can be global or user-specific.
Values: String data associated with keys.

sect1.para: The Store module requires authentication credentials and can operate against a specific ESP URL or use the default ESP process on the cluster.

sect1.title: Store Module

row.entry: The name of the Store module instance

The username of the user requesting access to the key value store; this is typically the same username used to login to ECL Watch; set to an empty string if authentication is not required; OPTIONAL, defaults to an empty string

The password of the user requesting access to the key value store; this is typically the same password used to login to ECL Watch; set to an empty string if authentication is not required; OPTIONAL, defaults to an empty string

The full URL for accessing the esp process running on the HPCC Systems cluster (this is typically the same URL as used to access ECL Watch); set to an empty string to use the URL of the current esp process as found via Std.File.GetEspURL(); OPTIONAL, defaults to an empty string
Return:
A reference to the module, correctly initialized with the given access parameters

sect1.para: A Store module instance is defined in ECL with the necessary authentication credentials and ESP endpoint. Subsequent function calls use the module instance to access the key/value store.

sect1.title: CreateStore

row.entry: The name of the Store module instance
A STRING naming the store to create; this cannot be an empty string; REQUIRED
A STRING describing the purpose of the store; may be an empty string; OPTIONAL, defaults to an empty string

If TRUE, this store will be visible only to the user indicated by the (username, userPW) arguments provided when the module was defined; if FALSE, the store will be global and visible to all users; OPTIONAL, defaults to FALSE
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A CreateStoreResponseRec RECORD. If the store already exists then the result will show succeeded = FALSE and already_present = TRUE.

sect1.para: The CreateStore function creates a key/value store if it has not been created before. If the store has already been created then this function has no effect.

sect1.title: ListStores

row.entry: The name of the Store module instance

A STRING defining a filter to be applied to the store's name; the filter accepts the '*' wildcard character to indicate 'match anything' and '?' to match any single character; string comparisons are case-insensitive; an empty string is equivalent to '*'; OPTIONAL, defaults to '*'

A STRING defining a filter to be applied to the store's owner; the filter accepts the '*' wildcard character to indicate 'match anything' and '?' to match any single character; string comparisons are case-insensitive; an empty string is equivalent to '*'; OPTIONAL, defaults to '*'
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A ListStoresResponseRec RECORD

sect1.para: The ListStores function gets a list of available stores based on the provided filters.

sect1.title: ListNamespaces

row.entry: The name of the Store module instance
A STRING naming the store containing the namespaces you are interested in; set this to an empty string to reference the default store in the cluster, if one has been defined; REQUIRED
If TRUE, the system will look only for private keys; if FALSE then the system will look for global keys; OPTIONAL, defaults to FALSE
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A ListNamespacesResponseRec RECORD

sect1.para: The ListNamespaces function gets a list of namespaces defined in the specified store.

sect1.title: WithNamespace Module

row.entry: The name of the parent Store module instance
The name of the namespace-specific module instance
A STRING naming the namespace partition that will be used for this module; cannot be an empty string; REQUIRED
A STRING naming the store that this module will access; set this to an empty string to reference the default store in the cluster, if one has been defined; OPTIONAL, defaults to an empty string
Return:
A reference to the module, correctly initialized with the given namespace

sect1.para: The WithNamespace submodule nails down a specific namespace to access within a key/value store on the cluster. All subsequent operations will be scoped to this namespace.

sect1.title: SetKeyValue

row.entry: The name of the namespace-specific module instance
A STRING naming the key; may not be an empty string; REQUIRED
A STRING representing the value to store for the key; may be an empty string; REQUIRED

If TRUE, this key will be visible only to the user indicated by the (username, userPW) arguments provided when the module was defined; if FALSE, the key will be global and visible to all users; OPTIONAL, defaults to FALSE
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A SetKeyValueResponseRec RECORD

sect1.para: The SetKeyValue function sets a value for a key within a namespace. If the key already exists then its value is overridden. The namespace will be created if it has not already been defined.

sect1.title: GetKeyValue

row.entry: The name of the namespace-specific module instance
A STRING naming the key; may not be an empty string; REQUIRED
If TRUE, the system will look only for private keys; if FALSE then the system will look for global keys; OPTIONAL, defaults to FALSE
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A GetKeyValueResponseRec RECORD. Note that the record will have was_found set to TRUE or FALSE, depending on whether the key was actually found in the key/value store.

sect1.para: The GetKeyValue function gets a previously-set value for a key within a namespace.

sect1.title: DeleteKeyValue

row.entry: The name of the namespace-specific module instance
A STRING naming the key; may not be an empty string; REQUIRED
If TRUE, the system will look only for private keys; if FALSE then the system will look for global keys; OPTIONAL, defaults to FALSE
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A DeleteKeyValueResponseRec RECORD

sect1.para: The DeleteKeyValue function deletes a previously-set key and value within a namespace.

sect1.title: GetAllKeys

row.entry: The name of the namespace-specific module instance
If TRUE, the system will look only for private keys; if FALSE then the system will look for global keys; OPTIONAL, defaults to FALSE
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A GetAllKeysResponseRec RECORD

sect1.para: The GetAllKeys function gets a list of all keys currently defined within a namespace.

sect1.title: GetAllKeyValues

row.entry: The name of the namespace-specific module instance
If TRUE, the system will look only for private keys; if FALSE then the system will look for global keys; OPTIONAL, defaults to FALSE
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A GetAllKeyValuesResponseRec RECORD

sect1.para: The GetAllKeyValues function gets a list of all keys and their associated values currently defined within a namespace.

sect1.title: DeleteNamespace

row.entry: The name of the namespace-specific module instance
If TRUE, the system will look only for private keys; if FALSE then the system will look for global keys; OPTIONAL, defaults to FALSE
The number of seconds to wait for the underlying SOAPCALL to complete; set to zero to wait forever; OPTIONAL, defaults to zero
Return:
A DeleteNamespaceResponseRec RECORD

sect1.para: The DeleteNamespace function deletes the namespace defined for this module and all keys and values defined within it.

sect1.title: Record Definitions
sect1.para: The Store module exports several RECORD definitions that are used as return types for the various functions. These records provide structured access to results and error information.
All response records include exception handling fields to provide detailed error information when operations fail. Check the has_exceptions field before accessing operation results.

sect2.title: ExceptionLayout
sect2.para: Defines the structure of a single exception or error message.

row.entry: Error code identifying the type of exception
Intended audience for the exception message
Source component that generated the exception
Human-readable description of the exception

sect2.title: ExceptionListLayout
sect2.para: Contains a list of exceptions that occurred during an operation.

row.entry: Source component that generated the exceptions
Dataset of ExceptionLayout records containing detailed exception information

sect2.title: StoreInfoRec
sect2.para: Contains information about a key/value store.

row.entry: Name of the store
Description of the store's purpose
Username of the store owner
Timestamp when the store was created
Maximum size in bytes for values stored in this store
TRUE if this is the default store for the cluster

sect2.title: ListStoresResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the ListStores function.

row.entry: Dataset of StoreInfoRec records containing information about each matching store
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details

sect2.title: CreateStoreResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the CreateStore function.

row.entry: TRUE if a new store was created, FALSE if store already existed or an error occurred
TRUE if the store already existed
Name of the store
Description of the store
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details

sect2.title: SetKeyValueResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the SetKeyValue function.

row.entry: TRUE if the key/value was successfully set
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details

sect2.title: GetKeyValueResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the GetKeyValue function.

row.entry: TRUE if the key was found, FALSE if the key does not exist
The value associated with the key, if found
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details

sect2.title: DeleteKeyValueResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the DeleteKeyValue function.

row.entry: TRUE if the key/value was successfully deleted
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details

sect2.title: GetAllKeysResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the GetAllKeys function.

row.entry: Name of the namespace
Dataset containing all keys defined in the namespace
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details

sect2.title: GetAllKeyValuesResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the GetAllKeyValues function.

row.entry: Name of the namespace
Dataset containing all key/value pairs defined in the namespace
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details

sect2.title: ListNamespacesResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the ListNamespaces function.

row.entry: Dataset containing all namespaces defined in the store
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details

sect2.title: DeleteNamespaceResponseRec
sect2.para: Response record returned by the DeleteNamespace function.

row.entry: TRUE if the namespace was successfully deleted
TRUE if any exceptions occurred during the operation
ExceptionListLayout record containing any error details
